mapper.sql: a.id, a.book_id, a.title, a.content, a.translation, a.difficulty, a.word_count, a.audio_url, a.status, a.create_time, a.update_time, b.title AS book_title
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_book b ON a.book_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_book b ON a.book_id = b.id WHERE a.book_id = #{bookId} AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_article (book_id, title, content, translation, difficulty, word_count, audio_url, status) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{translation}, #{difficulty}, #{wordCount}, #{audioUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_article WHERE status = 1
